data.title: A whale that shorted 255 BTC closed its long positions in BTC, ETH, and SOL, resulting in a loss of $2.86 million and reducing its total profit to $2.97 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the whale (0x94d...3814) that previously shorted 255 BTC has closed its long positions in BTC, ETH, and SOL, incurring a loss of $2.86 million. The whale currently holds a 5x leveraged short position in DASH, with a floating profit of $650,000. As a result, its total profit has decreased from $25.5 million to $2.97 million.

data.title: Northeast Rehabilitation Hospital Proposes Settlement After Data Breach
data.description: Northeast Rehabilitation Hospital, a U.S. healthcare provider, has reached a proposed settlement following a cybersecurity breach that compromised sensitive patient information. According to NS3.AI, individuals who have documented financial losses due to the breach may be eligible to claim up to $5,000. Others affected by the breach can receive a one-time payment of $75. The settlement is awaiting court approval, with the deadline for claims submission set for February 17, 2026, and the final hearing scheduled for March 2, 2026.

data.title: Sui Collaborates with Nansen for Enhanced Blockchain Data Access
data.description: Sui has announced a partnership with cryptocurrency analytics firm Nansen to improve on-chain data access for developers, builders, and institutions within the Sui ecosystem. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration provides access to Nansen's AI-driven analytics platform, which includes wallet intelligence and smart money tracking capabilities. The partnership is designed to deliver real-time analysis of network activities and offer deeper insights into fund movements on the Sui blockchain.

data.title: BNB Chain to Host Good Vibes Only Hackathon in January 2026
data.description: BNB Chain has announced an 8-day hackathon titled 'Good Vibes Only,' scheduled from January 22 to 29, 2026. According to NS3.AI, the event is open to developers of all skill levels and encourages participants to engage in on-chain transactions on the BNB Chain throughout the duration. The hackathon will feature open theme submissions, allowing for a wide range of innovative projects. Winners will be determined through a combination of community votes and sponsor evaluations, with a prize pool starting at $1,000 per project.

data.title: Potential Shift in Investment from Precious Metals to Cryptocurrency
data.description: CyrilXBT posted on X. The discussion suggests that as silver and gold markets begin to stabilize, there may be a shift in investment towards Bitcoin and alternative cryptocurrencies. This perspective highlights a potential trend where profits from precious metals could be redirected into the digital currency market, indicating a possible increase in interest and investment in cryptocurrencies.

data.title: SPACE briefly broke through 0.03 USDT
data.description: SPACE briefly broke through 0.03 USDT and is currently trading at 0.024 USDT, with a market capitalization of $51.9 million.

data.title: The Future of Cryptocurrency Payments: Opportunities and Challenges
data.description: Phyrex posted on X. The development of cryptocurrency payments raises questions about its potential to surpass traditional payment methods. Key considerations include identifying scenarios where cryptocurrency payments are irreplaceable by traditional systems and understanding the circumstances under which they might exceed the limitations of conventional payment methods. As the digital currency landscape evolves, these questions remain central to discussions about the future of financial transactions.

data.title: A whale withdrew 1.34 billion PUMPs from OKX, bringing its total holdings to $6.92 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (26nbF...kt5j) withdrew 1.34 billion PUMPs from OKX, worth $3.31 million. Currently, this whale holds 2.8 billion PUMPs, worth $6.92 million.

data.title: The author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad" does not pay attention to asset price fluctuations and continuously buys BTC and ETH.
data.description: Robert Kiyosaki, author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad," stated that he is not concerned about the price fluctuations of gold, silver, and Bitcoin. Kiyosaki indicated that he continues to buy more gold, silver, Bitcoin, and Ethereum to accumulate more wealth. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Metalpha withdrew 8,500 ETH from Kraken and Binance, worth $24.85 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, Metalpha withdrew 8,500 ETH from Kraken and Binance, worth $24.85 million.

data.title: Turboos now offers leveraged trading, allowing users to earn airdrop incentives for their trades.
data.description: According to official news, Turbos has officially launched its leveraged trading feature, allowing users to experience leverage and real returns directly on the Sui network through Turbos' intuitive interface. This feature supports up to 5x leverage, with initial trading pairs including SUI–USDC, DEEP–USDC, and WAL–USDC. Furthermore, users engaging in leveraged trading via https://app.turbos.finance/#/margin have a chance to receive a $DEEP airdrop. Leveraging DeepBook's trading infrastructure and Turbos' user-friendly UI/UX, traders can seamlessly manage positions, effectively control risk, and achieve one-stop leveraged trading. Turbos will continue to launch innovative products in the future, bringing users a more diverse DeFi experience.

data.title: BNB Smart Chain Enhances Performance with Fermi Upgrade
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, introducing the Fermi upgrade for BNB Smart Chain, aimed at enhancing performance by reducing block time from 0.75 seconds to 0.45 seconds while maintaining network stability under real production conditions. This upgrade is delivered through the BSC v1.6.4 client, with v1.6.5 following as a synchronized maintenance release. The article highlights the significance of predictable block times at scale, emphasizing that faster blocks are beneficial only if they remain reliable. The Fermi upgrade is designed to improve responsiveness for users and developers without compromising reliability, addressing latency issues that can affect user experience and developer design choices.

The article explains that shorter block intervals are crucial for a chain operating at a global scale, as raw throughput alone is insufficient. The entire system must behave predictably while running faster under real production conditions, involving validators, nodes, infrastructure providers, wallets, and applications. The Fermi hard fork represents the next chapter in BSC's evolution, completing the short block interval roadmap to enable faster operations without sacrificing the reliability that developers, users, and operators depend on. For users, this means faster confirmations and smoother interactions with applications on BSC. Developers benefit from lower latency and more responsive on-chain interactions, which are vital for applications where speed is core to the product experience. Node operators can run a faster chain without trading away stability.

Fermi introduces a set of BEPs that work together to improve end-to-end performance, with the most visible change being the block interval reduction from 0.75 seconds to 0.45 seconds, the shortest in BSC's history. This reduction enhances the user and builder experience across wallets, infrastructure, and applications, making the chain feel faster. Transactions can be included sooner, confirmation times tighten, and DApps feel more responsive during peak activity, particularly for high-frequency DeFi use cases, advanced trading strategies, and workflows where users expect fast on-chain settlement. The article also discusses how Fermi fits into the BNB Chain 2026 roadmap, focusing on refining everyday performance and ensuring speed gains come with the stability expected by the ecosystem.

The article concludes by emphasizing that speed is only meaningful when it translates into real usability. Fermi is a step toward a chain that feels faster in everyday interactions while preserving the stability that allows an ecosystem to build with confidence, even as on-chain finance and consumer applications continue to grow. As this work is incremental by design, Fermi is one step in a broader roadmap, aiming to ship upgrades that make BSC faster and more capable without compromising the reliability the ecosystem depends on.

data.title: Data: The threshold for listed companies to enter the top 25 in terms of BTC holdings has risen to over 4,000 BTC.
data.description: Currently, the threshold for listed companies to enter the top 25 BTC holding rankings has exceeded 4,000 Bitcoins, and the holding threshold continues to rise. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Threshold for Top 25 Public Companies Holding Bitcoin Surpasses 4,000 BTC
data.description: The threshold for public companies to rank among the top 25 holders of Bitcoin has now exceeded 4,000 BTC. According to Odaily, this marks a continuous increase in the holding requirements for companies seeking to be listed among the largest Bitcoin treasuries.

data.title: Spot Gold Prices Fall Below $4,900 Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description: Spot gold prices have dropped below $4,900 per ounce, marking a 0.73% intraday decline. According to NS3.AI, this decrease indicates a weakening demand or profit-taking within the precious metals market. The shift in gold prices could potentially affect investor sentiment regarding safe-haven assets.

data.title: Spot gold fell back below $4,900 per ounce, down 0.73% on the day.
data.description: Spot gold fell below $4,900 per ounce, down 0.73% on the day. (Jinshi)

In the past hour, this address has cumulatively purchased approximately $200,000 worth of PIPPIN. According to Arkham platform tag information, this address also holds popular tokens such as TRUMP, USD1, MET, JELLYJELLY, PUMP, and JUP.

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns 50 Million USDC on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury recently destroyed 50 million USDC on the Ethereum blockchain. According to ChainCatcher, this transaction was detected just three minutes prior to the report. The burning of USDC tokens is a common practice used to manage the supply and maintain the stability of the stablecoin. This action reflects ongoing efforts to regulate the circulation of USDC within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 89,000 USDT with a 1.11% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 23, 2026, 09:35 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 89,000 USDT and is now trading at 88,996.257813 USDT, with a narrowed 1.11% decrease in 24 hours.
